data.body:
Halfway through fiscal 2026, which began in October, CBP's cocaine seizures at US borders are just over half of 2025's full-year total (36,700 pounds past 6 months vs. 70,100 pounds all of last year).

Terrible news for fans of the lethal boat strikes that started last September: no impact at all.
